seed helper (v1)
M4 worker (authoritative)
env: CAPACITY_BPS, FAIR_K,
REF_PKT, COMMITTED/CEILING_BPS

fair_config_map
ARRAY_OF_MAPS[2] of HASH 1024
service_id → fair_config (40 B)
{version, committed_bps, burst_bps,
cap_bps, cap_pps}
